candidates.title: Blind Box Packaging Design
candidates.brief: Upwork · Hourly Hi, I need a packaging designer to handle two things bundled together for my jewelry brand (Mogano Jewelry & Accessories): PART A — PRODUCT PHOTO RETOUCHING - Clean up iPhone product photos I'll provide of one physical sample case - Cut out the case on a transparent background, 300 DPI - Recolor the case + wrist strap into 11 additional color variants (12 total) - Maintain consistent lighting, shadow, and gold-clasp detail across all 12 - Translucent gemstone material — internal highlights and shadows should shift naturally with each color PART B — PRINT-READY PACKAGING FILE - Rebuild an existing design concept as a vector file on my manufacturer's dieline template - This is a retail blind box for a jewelry product launch WHAT I'M PROVIDING (in a shared Google Drive folder): 1. Visual mockup of the box design (reference only — AI-generated, not print-ready) 2. Supplier's

candidates.title: Streetwear Designer, Content Creator & Brand Growth Strategist (Long-Term Opportunity)
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro · Illustrator — for layered/retouched assets and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: We are building a premium streetwear fashion startup focused on exclusivity, storytelling, culture, and community. Our goal is not simply to sell clothing. We want to build a brand that people actively follow, engage with, talk about, and wait for before every product release. We are looking for a creative and ambitious individual who understands modern streetwear culture, Gen Z consumer psychology, fashion design, content creation, and organic brand growth. This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to help build a fashion brand from the ground up. --- ## Our Vision We are building the brand around a limited-drop model. Instead of constantly releasing products, we will launch carefully planned collections and exclusive drops. Key principles: • Limited quantities per design • Approximately 50 units per design • No restocks once sold out • Exclusive and collectible products • S

candidates.title: AI Visual Artist
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for layered/retouched assets and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: Job Description – Freelance AI Visual Artist (E-commerce Catalogue Images) Position: Freelance AI Visual Artist Overview: We are looking for a skilled Freelance AI Visual Artist to create high-quality AI-generated product and lifestyle images for e-commerce catalogue listings. The ideal candidate should have strong visual aesthetics, prompt engineering skills, image editing expertise, and an understanding of e-commerce product presentation standards. This role involves generating clean, premium, and conversion-focused visuals for online marketplaces, websites, and brand catalogues across multiple product categories. Key Responsibilities: Create high-quality AI-generated product visuals for e-commerce catalogues Generate lifestyle and studio-style product images using AI tools Maintain accurate product representation based on provided references Ensure consistency in lighting, angles, sha

candidates.title: Luxury E-commerce Brand Visuals
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I’m creating a high-end brand that unites graphic design, videography, photography and a streamlined e-commerce website. The entire identity must feel unmistakably premium: think a deep black canvas paired with crisp white typography, minimal ornamentation, and a confident, modern layout. Logo & Core Identity The logo has to rely purely on typography—no symbols, icons or complex marks. Clean letterforms, balanced kerning and a subtle nod to luxury brands such as Saint Laurent or Balenciaga are key. Alongside the primary lock-up, I’ll need a monochrome palette, font recommendations and usage rules so every asset—from product packaging to video title cards—stays consistent. E-commerce Experience The site’s main job is selling. It should showcase products elegantly while highlighting verified customer reviews (this is the one essential feature I specified). Wireframes or high-fidelity mock-

candidates.title: Dynamic Product Feature Animation
candidates.tools: After Effects · Animate — for layered/retouched assets and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: My team is kicking off a new campaign and I need an eye-catching animation that spotlights a product’s key features. The specific item hasn’t been finalised yet— it could be electronics, clothing, or furniture— so the approach must stay flexible and applicable to any category. The goal is clear visual storytelling: smooth camera moves, close-ups, smart call-outs and lighting that make every benefit instantly understandable. Whether you work in Blender, Cinema 4D, Maya, 3ds Max or Houdini is up to you; the finished piece just needs to look premium and render efficiently for web and social. I’ll supply reference photos, dimensions and feature notes once the SKU is chosen. You’ll translate those assets into a short storyboard, build the scene, animate, render at 1080p or higher, and composite if needed. Deliverables • Final 15–60 s video (MP4/MOV) • Source project files (3D + any AEP/PSD) •

replacement_note: GEN-FREE replacement for a removed generative-expand task. NO image_generative_expand, NO generative fill/outpaint, NO upscale. O8 stock-hero = license a correctly-sized stock image + crop/reframe + place logo (NOT expand a small image).
